description_long: This kiosk features a striking, tall rectangular structure with a large, vibrant graphic panel displaying an aurora borealis scene and the text 'NEW horizon Witnessing the Northern Lights.' The main panel is supported by a sturdy black frame and stands on a wood-patterned platform. In front of the main display is a sleek, modern counter with a matching graphic, designed for interaction or information distribution. The left side of the kiosk is adorned with a bold black-and-white striped pattern, adding a contemporary visual accent. The rear and side panels are solid, with the right side featuring additional signage and text. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually engaging, suitable for attracting attention in urban environments such as trade shows, public squares, or event spaces.
description: A modern, visually striking kiosk with a tall aurora-themed display panel, a matching counter, and bold striped side accents, set on a wood-patterned platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main aurora-themed display, prominent signage, and the interactive counter.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the side panel with additional text and the counter's side profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel with black-and-white stripes and minimal visible signage.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the striped side panel and the back of the main display, with the counter partially visible.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the main display and counter, featuring large text ('NEW horizon Witnessing the Northern Lights') and additional descriptive text on the right side panel.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, no overhangs or decorative elements, matching the rectangular modern design.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with minimalist and contemporary graphic influences
